(a) A foreign-based international motor carrier required to register under this chapter or registered under Chapter 645 (Unified Carrier Registration) may not transport persons or cargo in intrastate commerce in this state.

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 643. Motor Carrier Registration
##### § 643.062 — Limitation on International Motor Carrier

(a) A foreign-based international motor carrier required to register under this chapter or registered under Chapter 645 (Unified Carrier Registration) may not transport persons or cargo in intrastate commerce in this state.

(b) A person may not assist a foreign-based international motor carrier in violating Subsection (a).

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 62, Sec. 17.14(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1999; Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 603, Sec. 4, eff. Aug. 30, 1999.*

subsections.label: a

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A person may not assist a foreign-based international motor carrier in violating Subsection (a).
